title: KreativeKraft Coloured Pencils Set of 180 - Colouring Pencils for Kids Teens and Adults - 30 Colours Sharpener Included - Art Supplies School Supplies - Kids Pencils Age 3+
features: 30 Vibrant Colours: This set includes 180 colouring pencils for children in a range of 30 vibrant colours. Perfect for kids or adults who love to be creative! Suitable for aged 3+
Sharpener Included: These childrens pencils sets come with a handy sharpener included with a plastic case that catches the shavings. They can enjoy hours of mess-free colouring fun
For Art and School Projects: This colouring set for kids is perfect for being creative at home, taking on trips, or using for school projects. The possibilities are endless
Creative Fun Anywhere: These colouring pencils for adults and children are easy to travel with using the box provided, perfect for creativity on-the-go!
Fun Gifts for Kids: These kids colouring sets make a great gift for Christmas, birthdays or special occasions and are perfect for encouraging creativity and imaginative exploration
description: Product Description A Rainbow of Possibilities This set comes with 180 colouring pencils in a range of 30 vibrant colours, providing endless possibilities for creative exploration. Designed specifically for children aged 3 and above, these colouring pencils are an excellent tool to unleash their imagination and enhance their fine motor skills. Pencil Sharpener Included In addition to the stunning array of colours, this set includes a pencil sharpener, ensuring that your child's pencils are always ready for use. With this convenient addition, your child can keep their pencils sharp and create detailed and precise artwork. Encourage Imaginative Creativity Encourage your child's love for art and watch their creativity soar with our set of 180 colouring pencils for kids. With its 30 vibrant colours, suitable for children aged 3 and above, this set provides endless opportunities for imaginative expression. The video showcases the product in use.
